item.title: When feedback feels extra personal
item.description: A short look at why ordinary feedback can feel overwhelming for some people.

media:content.media:title: When feedback feels extra personal
media:content.media:description: A short look at why ordinary feedback can feel overwhelming for some people.

item.title: Why ADHD brains may focus better in coffee shops
item.description: A look at why some people with ADHD may find coffee shops helpful for focus, and what’s really behind the effect.

media:content.media:title: Why ADHD brains may focus better in coffee shops
media:content.media:description: A look at why some people with ADHD may find coffee shops helpful for focus, and what’s really behind the effect.

item.title: Laundry as a survival strategy
item.description: A lighthearted take on how laundry can feel less like a routine and more like a survival strategy.

media:content.media:title: Laundry as a survival strategy
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted take on how laundry can feel less like a routine and more like a survival strategy.

item.title: Build a Better Relationship by Letting Go of Perfection
item.description: A simple reminder to focus on connection over perfection and create a healthier relationship mindset.

media:content.media:title: Build a Better Relationship by Letting Go of Perfection
media:content.media:description: A simple reminder to focus on connection over perfection and create a healthier relationship mindset.

item.title: Tired tired is my whole brand
item.description: A relatable look at the feeling many people recognize, especially in conversations about ADHD in women.

media:content.media:title: Tired tired is my whole brand
media:content.media:description: A relatable look at the feeling many people recognize, especially in conversations about ADHD in women.

item.title: Rethinking Gratitude and ADHD
item.description: While some highlight the positive aspects of neurodivergence, it is completely valid to struggle. Explore why you don't need to feel grateful for a condition with daily challenges.

media:content.media:title: Rethinking Gratitude and ADHD
media:content.media:description: While some highlight the positive aspects of neurodivergence, it is completely valid to struggle. Explore why you don't need to feel grateful for a condition with daily challenges.

item.title: ADHD Symptom That Can Strain Relationships
item.description: Certain ADHD symptoms can put a strain on personal relationships. Explore how these behaviors impact communication and learn healthy ways for partners to support one another.

media:content.media:title: ADHD Symptom That Can Strain Relationships
media:content.media:description: Certain ADHD symptoms can put a strain on personal relationships. Explore how these behaviors impact communication and learn healthy ways for partners to support one another.

item.title: A psychiatrist with ADHD shares top advice
item.description: Combining professional expertise with personal lived experience, a psychiatrist diagnosed with ADHD shares their most effective strategy for managing daily life.

media:content.media:title: A psychiatrist with ADHD shares top advice
media:content.media:description: Combining professional expertise with personal lived experience, a psychiatrist diagnosed with ADHD shares their most effective strategy for managing daily life.

item.title: A Clear Analogy for Understanding ADHD
item.description: Demystify how the ADHD brain manages focus and processes information with a simple, relatable analogy that makes the neurodevelopmental condition easy to understand.

media:content.media:title: A Clear Analogy for Understanding ADHD
media:content.media:description: Demystify how the ADHD brain manages focus and processes information with a simple, relatable analogy that makes the neurodevelopmental condition easy to understand.

item.title: ADHD habits and self-awareness
item.description: Learn how developing self-awareness helps individuals recognize daily ADHD habits, identify triggers, and build practical routines for managing everyday challenges.

media:content.media:title: ADHD habits and self-awareness
media:content.media:description: Learn how developing self-awareness helps individuals recognize daily ADHD habits, identify triggers, and build practical routines for managing everyday challenges.

item.title: When the speech doesn’t go as planned
item.description: A lighthearted moment about having a speech ready, then saying something unexpected.

media:content.media:title: When the speech doesn’t go as planned
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted moment about having a speech ready, then saying something unexpected.

item.title: One clock check, full internal audit
item.description: A relatable ADHD moment: checking the clock can turn into a full internal audit. If you know the feeling, you’re not alone.

media:content.media:title: One clock check, full internal audit
media:content.media:description: A relatable ADHD moment: checking the clock can turn into a full internal audit. If you know the feeling, you’re not alone.

item.title: Is ADHD Really a Superpower?
item.description: A look at the "ADHD superpower" concept, balancing positive traits like hyperfocus and creativity with the real, daily challenges of the neurodevelopmental condition.

media:content.media:title: Is ADHD Really a Superpower?
media:content.media:description: A look at the "ADHD superpower" concept, balancing positive traits like hyperfocus and creativity with the real, daily challenges of the neurodevelopmental condition.

item.title: Why Partners See Your Toughest Side
item.description: A brief look at why people may show their toughest side most often at home, and what that can mean for relationships.

media:content.media:title: Why Partners See Your Toughest Side
media:content.media:description: A brief look at why people may show their toughest side most often at home, and what that can mean for relationships.
